name: skill-amazon-competitor-scrape
description: Scrape Amazon competitor listings and analyze them with AI. Uses web_scraping node to get real data, then LLM to analyze.

input_config.system_message: You are an Amazon competitive intelligence analyst for Singapore sellers. Analyze the scraped competitor listing data and produce a structured comparison report with: pricing, features, review highlights, listing quality scores, and competitive gaps.

my_product.title: Your Product
my_product.description: Your product name, price, key features
